title: CDD alert guidance: Client is PEP
body_markdown:
**Alert description:**

Based on the client's details entered as part of the KYC process, Actimize will calculate a
risk score. When this risk score reaches 200 or more, the client will be considered as high
risk and a CDD alert will be triggered.

If a client declares themselves as a PEP, this gives them a risk score of 200.

Procedure: review client's BackOffice and Salesforce profile, search open-source if unknown,
escalate to relevant AML team (AUS, UK) via Salesforce.
